ogTitle: Pormpuraaw vs Port Alma: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pormpuraaw and Port Alma.
heading: Pormpuraaw vs Port Alma — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pormpuraaw, Queensland and Port Alma, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Port Alma has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Pormpuraaw (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pormpuraaw or Port Alma safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pormpuraaw has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Port Alma scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pormpuraaw scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Port Alma scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pormpuraaw or Port Alma?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Port Alma has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
